    updateAuthor(String newAuthor)
    If the author of a book is incorrect, this method can be used to update the current book being viewed's author reference in the Books repository.

  • Constructor Details

    • BookActivity

      public BookActivity()

  • Method Details

    • onCreate

      protected void onCreate(android.os.Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Overrides:
      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity

    • bookSearchRepository

      private void bookSearchRepository(String mediaTitle)
      This method searches our database for the requested book coming from the Search activity. At this point, the book will always be in the repository, as that is handled in SearchActivity.
      Parameters:
      mediaTitle - The name of the book to be located in the Books repository.

    • deleteBook

      private void deleteBook(String mediaTitle)
      This method deletes the book currently being viewed. Restricted to Administrators.
      Parameters:
      mediaTitle - The name of the book to be deleted.

    • updateAuthor

      private void updateAuthor(String newAuthor)
      If the author of a book is incorrect, this method can be used to update the current book being viewed's author reference in the Books repository.
      Parameters:
      newAuthor - The name of the updated author reference.
